name: universal-brute-workpack
description: Universal Brute Workpack — a full-capability stdio-first Agent MCP workpack with configurable tools, memory fallback, and Agent pipeline orchestration.
changelog: 0.1.1: adds worker search/analyze/diff, managed sidecar orchestration, concurrent agent pipelines, audit runDir collector, code.review, and validate.load.
changelogDetail: Adds CPU-parallel fs.grep plus worker.search/analyze/diff, auto-managed sidecar process for agent.spawn/pipeline, pipeline concurrency controls, TaskCard/runDir/report/EvidenceBundle audit tools, structured code.review, static validate.load, richer doctor output, and docs for graceful no-key degradation.
author: Yupeng Zhou
